### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices')

## IDomainServiceInvoker Interface

Minimal contract for invoking a domain service to process a command\.
The server calls domain services via DAPR; in tests, this is faked\.

```csharp
public interface IDomainServiceInvoker
```

&#8627; [DaprDomainServiceInvoker](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.DaprDomainServiceInvoker.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices\.DaprDomainServiceInvoker')

## IDomainServiceInvoker\.InvokeAsync\(CommandEnvelope, object, CancellationToken\) Method

Invokes a domain service to process the specified command against the current aggregate state\.

```csharp
System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Results.DomainResult> InvokeAsync(Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandEnvelope command, object? currentState, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken=default(System.Threading.CancellationToken));
```
